title: Mental Health Information/Education - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Mental Health Information/Education 12 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter DEPRESSION AND BIPOLAR SUPPORT ALLIANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides educational information about depression and bipolar disorder, an in-person support group locator, and online support groups. Resources are tailored to individuals experiencing depression and/or bipolar disorder as well as their families, friends, and peers. 500 W Madison Street Suite 1000 Chicago, IL 60661 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (312) 642-0049 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL ALLIANCE ON MENTAL ILLNESS OF OREGON NATIONAL ALLIANCE ON MENTAL ILLNESS CENTRAL OREGON NAMI OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF An information and referral helpline that provide consumers and family members with information on local mental health services, access to mental health providers, prescription assistance programs, transportation, supportive peer counseling, family-centered and peer-delivered education programs, support and consumer rights groups, and other basic services. PO Box 7462 Bend, OR 977087462 Eligibility: Individuals living with mental illness and their families and loved ones Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 316-0167 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL ALLIANCE ON MENTAL ILLNESS OF OREGON NAMI OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF An information and referral helpline that provide consumers and family members with information on local mental health services, access to mental health providers, prescription assistance programs, transportation, supportive peer counseling, family-centered and peer-delivered education programs, support and consumer rights groups, and other basic services. 147 SE 102nd Avenue Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Individuals living with mental illness and their families and loved ones Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 230-8009 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES GRESHAM NARA NW YOUTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides life skills training, methamphetamine and suicide prevention courses, cultural groups and activities. Can also provide referrals to other agency services. 620 NE 2nd Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Ages 13-24 who identify as Native American Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 953-6598 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK MID-OREGON REGION OFFICE REACH OUT OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a parent warmline offering peer support and connections to local resources, including one-to-one support, resource navigation, support groups, training, and advocacy. 4263 Commercial Street SE Suite 300 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Parents and caregivers raising children and youth with emotional, mental, behavioral, or other health needs Hours: Reach Out Oregon: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm. Closed holidays. Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (833) 732-2467 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK NORTH OFFICE REACH OUT OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a parent warmline offering peer support and connections to local resources, including one-to-one support, resource navigation, support groups, training, and advocacy. 7110 SW Fir Loop Suite 160 Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Parents and caregivers raising children and youth with emotional, mental, behavioral, or other health needs Hours: Reach Out Oregon: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm. Closed holidays. Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (833) 732-2467 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK SOUTH OREGON REACH OUT OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a parent warmline offering peer support and connections to local resources, including one-to-one support, resource navigation, support groups, training, and advocacy. 72A Centennial Loop Suite 150 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Parents and caregivers raising children and youth with emotional, mental, behavioral, or other health needs Hours: Reach Out Oregon: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm. Closed holidays. Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (833) 732-2467 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a call-in center for family members of children and youth with special needs and chronic health conditions (developmental and emotional disabilities, behavioral problems, and chronic physical illnesses) and professionals who serve them. The center specializes in providing information and resources related to health information, health care access, and special needs systems and supports. All calls are confidential. Families may also request to be placed on an email list to receive monthly correspondence about issues of importance to children and youth with special needs in Oregon. 707 SW Gaines Street Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Family members of individuals age 26 and younger with special physical, emotional, behavioral, or mental health needs, including those who are at risk or suspected of having a special need. The child/youth does not have to have a diagnosed condition. Does not require documentation to prove citizenship to receive services. Hours: Message line available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (833) 990-9930 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pediatric psychological evaluations, including Autism and ADHD assessments. Treatment available for a wide range of concerns: depression, sleep difficulties, self-esteem and self-confidence issues, family and peer relationship challenges, toileting, sleep training, and managing anxiety, fears, and worries. 2701 NW Vaughn Street Suite 360 Portland, OR 97210 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 227-0671 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST BEAVERTON BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pediatric psychological evaluations, including Autism and ADHD assessments. Treatment available for a wide range of concerns: depression, sleep difficulties, self-esteem and self-confidence issues, family and peer relationship challenges, toileting, sleep training, and managing anxiety, fears, and worries. 14795 SW Murray Scholls Drive Suite 121 Beaverton, OR 97007 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 673-1071 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST TIGARD BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pediatric psychological evaluations, including Autism and ADHD assessments. Treatment available for a wide range of concerns: depression, sleep difficulties, self-esteem and self-confidence issues, family and peer relationship challenges, toileting, sleep training, and managing anxiety, fears, and worries. 7150 SW Dartmouth Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 968-3480 Get Directions Visit Website More Details POLK COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH POLK COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH DALLAS POLK CARES CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health drop-in services, including suicide prevention, safety planning, and information and referrals to community resources and ongoing care. Also supports recovery from substance use, with treatment referrals and overdose prevention education. 182 SW Academy Street Suite 333 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed on holidays (503) 623-9289 1 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL ALLIANCE ON MENTAL ILLNESS OF OREGON NAMI OREGON NATIONAL ALLIANCE ON MENTAL ILLNESS OF OREGON NAMI OREGON NATIVE AMERICAN REHABILITATION ASSOCIATION OF THE NORTHWEST NARA NW YOUTH PROGRAM OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK REACH OUT OREGON OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK REACH OUT OREGON OREGON FAMILY SUPPORT NETWORK REACH OUT OREGON OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER OREGON FAMILY TO FAMILY HEALTH INFORMATION CENTER PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES PEDIATRIC ASSOCIATES OF THE NORTHWEST BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES POLK COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH POLK CARES CENTER
